query: I was charged twice for the World Cup final pay-per-view and I want my money back.
My last bill seems higher than usual, can you explain the charges?
The India vs Brazil match keeps buffering and won't load, what's going on?
Stream keeps freezing every few minutes during the match.
I want to upgrade my plan so I can watch matches in 4K.
What data plans do you offer with rollover?
I'm thinking of cancelling and switching to another provider.
How do I close my account?
My wifi router keeps disconnecting every hour.
There's no signal at my house since this morning.
I don't know what's wrong honestly, nothing is working, can someone just call me back.
